description.value:
Madrosarais with lime blood have often produced impressive innovations and enacted great changes throughout the Virtuum and beyond. The blood in these veins is seen as a path into many professions, but especially those where one works with objects.

You become trained in Crafting. If you would automatically become trained in Crafting (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in another skill of your choice. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Quick Repair] skill feat.
